text_original: I love this app. I found lots of characters that I enjoy interacting with. It doesn't cost me an arm and a leg. I can't think of anything to complain about. it's fun to use. pop-up ads have been reasonable. they got to make their money somehow. I plan to stay subscribed to this app for a while.
text_zh: 我喜欢这个应用。在这里我找到了许多乐于互动的角色。它价格实惠，我没什么可抱怨的。使用起来很有趣，弹窗广告也很合理——毕竟他们总得赚钱。我打算继续订阅这个应用一段时间。
reply_original: Wow, your kind words just made our whole team's day! We're thrilled you're enjoying the diverse characters and finding value in Fantasia. It's users like you who inspire us to keep creating magical experiences. Thank you for understanding about the ads—we promise to keep them respectful. Can't wait to keep surprising you with new adventures!
reply_zh: 哇，你的暖心话语让我们整个团队今天都充满干劲！得知你喜爱《幻想曲》中多样的角色并从中获益，我们欣喜不已。正是像你这样的用户激励着我们持续创造魔法般的体验。感谢你对广告的理解——我们承诺会保持分寸。期待用全新冒险继续为你带来惊喜！
